projectDescription: A Lua-based interactive CLI hub for Linux that bundles utilities including a system info viewer, MAP testing tool, Kahoot game botter (KBotter), a large-file creator, and a self-destruct mode.
keyFeatures: Interactive terminal menu with ANSI color output
System information display (CPU, GPU, RAM, storage, uptime, IP)
MAP testing tool for scraping student IDs and auto-confirming students
KBotter: multi-threaded Kahoot game botter with name-bypass support
Create File: large file generator with real-time progress bar
Debugging menu with ANSI color swatch display
publicApiSurface: Menu option 2: Testing Tool (MAP session join/scrape/confirm)
Menu option 4: Create File (large file writer)
KBotter join_game(gamePin, playerName) — WebSocket bot thread
qrencode.lua qrcode(str, ec_level) — QR code matrix generator
